texto: When you’re poor and hungry and frightened of failure, you often don’t have the luxury of high values, lofty goals, and social conscience. Funny how fear and poverty will acid-wash your value set, burn away all the flimflam and artifice and learned morality and leave you with nothing but the urgency of survival. - Dr. Dan Trix - Chasing the Horizon.
explicacao: Citação de Rodney Romig sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “When you’re poor and hungry and frightened of failure, you often don’t have the luxury of high va…” articula humor, insight, mystery-series em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como insight e mystery-series.
